_comment: Keyboard source -> Dreamcast pad. The on-screen keyboard renders THIS file. 'layout' col/row MIRROR the real controller: shoulder triggers L/R on the top row, d-pad left, Start centre, face diamond right (Y-top/X-left/B-right/A-bottom). Keys stay intuitive: WASD d-pad, IJKL face diamond, Q/P shoulders, Enter=Start. 'colors' = the real controller colour per button: the DC face buttons ARE coloured (A red, B blue, X yellow, Y green); the d-pad, Start, triggers and analog are grey. 'controls' = the Enter/action/cancel hotkeys. 'keys' = the emulator(keyboard)-target binding ONLY; the pi target sends button names straight to the Pico.
